mapper.select: SELECT /*selectBeautyPaymanetYearList*/ Z.PM_YEAR FROM( SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.PM_DATE,'yyyy-mm-dd'),'yyyy') AS PM_YEAR FROM BEAUTY_SALON_PAYMANET_INFO A WHERE 1=1 UNION SELECT TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'yyyy') AS PM_YEAR FROM DUAL ) Z GROUP BY PM_YEAR ORDER BY PM_YEAR DESC

SELECT /*selectBeautyPaymanetInfo*/ A.SEQ ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.PM_DATE,'yyyy-mm-dd'),'yyyy') AS PM_YEAR ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.PM_DATE,'yyyy-mm-dd'),'mm') AS PM_MONTH ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.PM_DATE,'yyyy-mm-dd'),'yyyy-mm-dd') AS PM_DATE ,A.STYLE_TYPE ,(SELECT CODE_NM FROM COMTCCMMNDETAILCODE WHERE CODE_ID='STYLE' AND CODE=A.STYLE_TYPE) AS STYLE_TYPE_NM ,A.PM_TYPE ,(SELECT CODE_NM FROM COMTCCMMNDETAILCODE WHERE CODE_ID='PMTYPE' AND CODE=A.PM_TYPE) AS PM_TYPE_NM ,A.PM_PRICE ,A.IDX ,TO_CHAR(A.REG_DATE,'yyyy-mm-dd') AS REG_DATE FROM BEAUTY_SALON_PAYMANET_INFO A WHERE A.SEQ = #{seq}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO BEAUTY_SALON_PAYMANET_INFO( SEQ, PM_DATE, STYLE_TYPE, PM_TYPE, PM_PRICE, IDX, REG_DATE
) VALUES ( SEQ_BEAUTY_SALON_PAYMANET_INFO_ID.NEXTVAL, #{pmDate}, #{styleType}, #{pmType}, #{pmPrice}, #{idx}, SYSDATE )
